description: Create a two-column content slide on summer travel flight choices with a donut chart for marquee trip flight type and a stacked bar chart for airfare booked or planned.

header.headline: Longer direct flights, whether domestic or international, gain some share over more complex itineraries
header.sub: With a higher-income traveling population and a willingness to spend on comfort, the front of the plane continues to see strong leisure intent, with a jump in first class and other premium fares purchased for marquee trips

left.center_label: of travelers will fly on their longest trip (versus 55% in 2025 and 51% in 2024 and 2023)

right.title: Type of airfare booked or planned

footer.source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey. Notes: Questions: (1) Which transportation option(s) will you be using to reach your destination during this trip? (Please select all that apply); (2) Which of the following best describes your flight?; (3) Which best describes the airfare that you have booked/are planning to book?; n = 1,023 travelers flying on their longest trip; pp stands for percentage points.
